complaint_example: The product broke after a few days
response: We sincerely apologize for the quality issue you experienced. Please contact us with your order number and we will arrange a replacement or full refund immediately.

complaint_example: This is defective and does not work at all
response: We are sorry to hear your product is defective. This is not the standard we hold ourselves to. Please share your order details and we will send a replacement right away.

complaint_example: The item stopped working after one week
response: We apologize that your product failed so quickly. We stand behind our products and will make this right — please reach out with your order number.

complaint_example: Poor build quality and feels cheap
response: We are sorry the product did not meet your quality expectations. We take this feedback seriously and would like to offer you a replacement or refund.

complaint_example: The product does not match the description at all
response: We apologize that the product did not match what was advertised. Please return it for a full refund and we will review the product listing immediately.

complaint_example: This product is dangerous and nearly caused an accident
response: We take safety concerns extremely seriously. Please stop using the product immediately. A safety team member will contact you within 2 hours to arrange a return and full refund.

complaint_example: My order arrived damaged
response: We apologize that your order arrived in poor condition. Please send us photos of the damage and your order number and we will ship a replacement at no cost.

complaint_example: Package never arrived and tracking shows delivered
response: We are sorry for this frustrating experience. We will investigate with the courier immediately and either resend your order or issue a full refund.

complaint_example: My order has been delayed for two weeks
response: We sincerely apologize for the shipping delay. We are investigating this with our logistics team and will provide an update within 24 hours.

complaint_example: I received the wrong item in my order
response: We are sorry you received the wrong item. Please keep it and we will send the correct product immediately at no extra charge.

complaint_example: My package was left outside in the rain and everything is ruined
response: We deeply apologize for how your package was handled. We will send a full replacement and file a complaint with the courier on your behalf.

complaint_example: I paid for express shipping but it arrived late
response: We apologize that your express delivery did not arrive on time. We will refund your shipping fee immediately and investigate the delay.

complaint_example: No one is helping me with my issue
response: We deeply apologize for the lack of support you have received. This is unacceptable. A senior customer service representative will contact you within 2 hours.

complaint_example: I have been waiting weeks for a response
response: We are truly sorry for the delayed response. You deserve better service than this. We will prioritize your case and follow up within 24 hours.

complaint_example: Your customer service representative was rude to me
response: We sincerely apologize for the poor treatment you received. This does not reflect our values. A customer care manager will personally follow up with you today.

complaint_example: I was promised a callback that never happened
response: We are sorry we did not follow through on our commitment. A senior representative will call you back within the next 2 hours — we will not let you down again.

complaint_example: I have called three times and nobody can resolve my issue
response: We deeply apologize for the repeated failures to resolve your issue. We are escalating your case to our senior resolution team who will contact you within the hour.

complaint_example: This looks nothing like the photos online
response: We apologize that the product did not match what was advertised. Please return it for a full refund and we will review the listing immediately.

complaint_example: Missing parts and incomplete product
response: We are sorry your order arrived incomplete. Please let us know which parts are missing and we will ship them free of charge within 2 business days.

complaint_example: The size is completely different from what was listed
response: We apologize for the sizing error in our listing. Please return the item for a full refund or exchange and we will update the product information.

complaint_example: The color is completely different from what I ordered
response: We are sorry the color does not match what was shown. We will send the correct item and arrange a free return of the incorrect one.

complaint_example: I was charged more than the listed price
response: We apologize for the billing error. We will refund the difference immediately and review our pricing system to prevent this from happening again.

complaint_example: Hidden fees were added at checkout
response: We are sorry for the unexpected charges. We will refund all additional fees and review our checkout process to ensure full transparency going forward.

complaint_example: I was double charged for my order
response: We sincerely apologize for the double charge. We will refund the duplicate payment immediately — it should appear in your account within 3-5 business days.

complaint_example: My discount code did not apply correctly
response: We are sorry the discount was not applied. We will manually apply the discount and adjust your total or issue a refund for the difference.

complaint_example: I requested a refund two weeks ago and have not received it
response: We apologize for the delay in processing your refund. We are escalating this immediately and your refund will be processed within 24 hours.

complaint_example: The return process is too complicated and confusing
response: We are sorry our return process caused frustration. A customer service agent will guide you through the return step by step — we want to make this as easy as possible.

complaint_example: I was denied a refund but the product is clearly faulty
response: We sincerely apologize for the incorrect refund denial. We are reviewing your case now and will issue a full refund within 24 hours.

complaint_example: I sent back the product weeks ago and have not heard anything
response: We apologize for the lack of communication about your return. We are tracking your return now and will confirm receipt and process your refund within 24 hours.

complaint_example: Worst experience ever with this company
response: We are truly sorry to hear this. Your experience is not what we stand for. A customer care manager will personally reach out to you within 24 hours.

complaint_example: I will never buy from you again
response: We completely understand your frustration and we are deeply sorry. We would love the opportunity to make this right — please give us a chance to resolve this for you.

complaint_example: This company does not care about its customers
response: We are truly sorry you feel this way — and we understand why. Your satisfaction is our top priority and we want to prove that to you. Please let us make this right.

complaint_example: I am going to leave a negative review everywhere I can
response: We completely understand your frustration and we are sorry we let you down. Before you do that please let us try to resolve your issue — a manager will contact you within the hour.
